meaning: n.同一,一致性,千篇一律,同一性
examples: She grew tired of the sameness of the food.
He grew bored by the sameness of the speeches.
The impact of this sameness on our emotional energy is gradual, but huge: It's like a tire with a slow leak.
Most of the titles seem so much alike, they blur into a cloud of sameness.
It had to be interestingly complicated, organic, and also avoid the sameness that often pervades generated environments.
